 Finalize the firmware download and execute an application reset (no return if successful, since it will execute a reset).

 Finalize the firmware download and execute an application reset (no return if successful, since it will execute a reset).

 Finalize the firmware download and execute an application reset (no return if successful, since it will execute a reset).

 Finalize the firmware download and execute an application reset (no return if successful, since it will execute a reset).

◆ IfxRfe_abortRampScenario()

error_t IfxRfe_abortRampScenario ( IfxRfe_abortRampScenario_t  req,
IfxRfe_abortRampScenarioResult_t *  res 
)

Abort the Sequencer.

  • reduced parameter version
    Parameters
    reqStructure containing the request parameters
    res[out] Result read from CTRX
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly otherwise

)

Abort the Sequencer.

  • expanded parameter version

    res[out] Result read from CTRX

◆ IfxRfe_abortRampScenario_finish()

error_t IfxRfe_abortRampScenario_finish ( IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t  handle,
IfxRfe_abortRampScenarioResult_t *  res 
)

Abort the Sequencer.

  • asynchronous finish wrapper
    Note
    It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_abortRampScenario_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
    The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling
    Parameters
    handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_abortRampScenario_start call
    res[out] Result read from CTRX
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_abortRampScenario_start()

error_t IfxRfe_abortRampScenario_start ( IfxRfe_abortRampScenario_t  req,
IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t *  handle 
)

Abort the Sequencer.

  • asynchronous start wrapper
    Note
    The function is blocking until the command is sent, but does not wait for the command execution
    Parameters
    reqStructure containing the request parameters
    handle[out] Handle for the async command
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_send otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_calculateMemoryCrc_exp()

error_t IfxRfe_calculateMemoryCrc_exp ( uint8_t  region,
uint32_t  passkey,
uint32_t  from_addr,
uint32_t  length,
IfxRfe_calculateMemoryCrcResult_t *  res 
)

Calculate CRC of Memory Range.

  • expanded parameter version
    Parameters
    regionRegion of memory to calculate CRC from.
    passkeyPasskey to access given addresses
    from_addrRelative start address in the region to calculate CRC (word aligned).
    lengthNumber of data words to calculate CRC.
    res[out] Result read from CTRX
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_calculateMemoryCrc_finish()

error_t IfxRfe_calculateMemoryCrc_finish ( IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t  handle,
IfxRfe_calculateMemoryCrcResult_t *  res 
)

Calculate CRC of Memory Range.

  • asynchronous finish wrapper
    Note
    It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_calculateMemoryCrc_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
    The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling
    Parameters
    handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_calculateMemoryCrc_start call
    res[out] Result read from CTRX
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise

error_t IfxRfe_configureDios_exp ( uint16_t  config_mask_ext,
uint8_t  clkmcu_drive_strength,
uint8_t  clkmcu_driver_config,
uint8_t  clkmcu_pull_config,
uint8_t  dmux1_drive_strength,
uint8_t  dmux1_driver_config,
uint8_t  dmux1_pull_config,
uint8_t  dmux2_drive_strength,
uint8_t  dmux2_driver_config,
uint8_t  dmux2_pull_config,
uint8_t  dmux3_drive_strength,
uint8_t  dmux3_driver_config,
uint8_t  dmux3_pull_config,
uint8_t  so_drive_strength,
uint8_t  so_driver_config,
uint8_t  so_pull_config,
uint8_t  rft_drive_strength,
uint8_t  rft_driver_config,
uint8_t  rft_pull_config 
)

Configure Digital IO Settings - expanded parameter version.

Parameters
config_mask_extIf a pin is selected in the config mask, none of the three settings can be "not selected"
clkmcu_drive_strengthSelect drive strength
clkmcu_driver_configSelect push-pull or open-drain configuration.
clkmcu_pull_configSelect tri-state, pull-down or pull-up configuration.
dmux1_drive_strengthSelect drive strength
dmux1_driver_configSelect push-pull or open-drain configuration.
dmux1_pull_configSelect tri-state, pull-down or pull-up configuration.
dmux2_drive_strengthSelect drive strength
dmux2_driver_configSelect push-pull or open-drain configuration.
dmux2_pull_configSelect tri-state, pull-down or pull-up configuration.
dmux3_drive_strengthSelect drive strength
dmux3_driver_configSelect push-pull or open-drain configuration.
dmux3_pull_configSelect tri-state, pull-down or pull-up configuration.
so_drive_strengthSelect drive strength
so_driver_configSelect push-pull or open-drain configuration.
so_pull_configSelect tri-state, pull-down or pull-up configuration.
rft_drive_strengthSelect drive strength
rft_driver_configSelect push-pull or open-drain configuration.
rft_pull_configSelect tri-state, pull-down or pull-up configuration.
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly otherwise
Parameters
config_mask_extb0 = 1 Valid CLK25 configuration.
clk25_drive_strengthSelect drive strength
clk25_driver_configSelect push-pull or open-drain configuration.
clk25_pull_configSelect tri-state, pull-down or pull-up configuration.
dmux1_drive_strengthSelect drive strength
dmux1_driver_configSelect push-pull or open-drain configuration.
dmux1_pull_configSelect tri-state, pull-down or pull-up configuration.
dmux2_drive_strengthSelect drive strength
dmux2_driver_configSelect push-pull or open-drain configuration.
dmux2_pull_configSelect tri-state, pull-down or pull-up configuration.
dmux3_drive_strengthSelect drive strength
dmux3_driver_configSelect push-pull or open-drain configuration.
dmux3_pull_configSelect tri-state, pull-down or pull-up configuration.
so_drive_strengthSelect drive strength
so_driver_configSelect push-pull or open-drain configuration.
so_pull_configSelect tri-state, pull-down or pull-up configuration.
rft_drive_strengthSelect drive strength
rft_driver_configSelect push-pull or open-drain configuration.
rft_pull_configSelect tri-state, pull-down or pull-up configuration.
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_configureDios_finish()

error_t IfxRfe_configureDios_finish ( IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t  handle)

Configure Digital IO Settings - asynchronous finish wrapper.

Note
It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_configureDios_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling
Parameters
handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_configureDios_start call
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_configureDios_start()

error_t IfxRfe_configureDios_start ( IfxRfe_configureDios_t  req,
IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t *  handle 
)

Configure Digital IO Settings - asynchronous start wrapper.

Note
The function is blocking until the command is sent, but does not wait for the command execution
Parameters
reqStructure containing the request parameters
handle[out] Handle for the async command
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_send otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_configureDmux_exp()

error_t IfxRfe_configureDmux_exp ( uint8_t  config_mask,
uint8_t  dmux1_alt_signal,
uint8_t  dmux1_dir,
uint8_t  dmux1_pulse_duration_ext,
uint8_t  dmux2_alt_signal,
uint8_t  dmux2_dir,
uint8_t  dmux2_pulse_duration_ext,
uint8_t  dmux3_alt_signal,
uint8_t  dmux3_dir,
uint8_t  dmux3_pulse_duration_ext 
)

Configure DMUX pins signal routing and direction.

  • expanded parameter version
    Parameters
    config_maskb0 = 1 Valid DMUX1 configuration
    dmux1_alt_signalDigital signal routed through the DMUX pin (for input, set to 0h).
    dmux1_dirDMUX pin direction input/output
    dmux1_pulse_duration_extOptional output pulse duration extension (for input, set to 0h).
    dmux2_alt_signalsee DMUX1 description
    dmux2_dirsee DMUX1 description
    dmux2_pulse_duration_extsee DMUX1 description
    dmux3_alt_signalsee DMUX1 description
    dmux3_dirsee DMUX1 description
    dmux3_pulse_duration_extsee DMUX1 description
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly otherwise

error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_configureHandle otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_configureRfFrequency_configUpdate()

error_t IfxRfe_configureRfFrequency_configUpdate ( uint8_t  handle,
IfxRfe_configureRfFrequency_t  req 
)

Change the DPLL's target frequency.

It does not turn on the PAs automatically. - configure handle (update) wrapper

Parameters
handleHandle of the already configured firmware command to be updated
reqStructure containing the request parameters
Return values

IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
Note

IfxRfe_configureRfFrequency_t  req 
)

Change the DPLL's target frequency.

It does not turn on the PAs automatically. - configure & execute handle (update) wrapper

Parameters
handleHandle of the already configured firmware command to be updated and executed

Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success

◆ IfxRfe_configureRfFrequency_exp()

error_t IfxRfe_configureRfFrequency_exp ( uint8_t  bc,
uint32_t  nmod,
uint32_t  ncw,
uint32_t  rampbw 
)

Change the DPLL's target frequency.

It does not turn on the PAs automatically. - expanded parameter version

Parameters
bcSwitch to select whether band should be changed
nmodNMOD (in Q5.20 format) is a parameter for TX modulator (DPLL) static frequency configuration.
ncwNCW (in UQ9.20 format) is the new value for the upper band limit
rampbwRAMPBW (in UQ5.20 format) is the new value for the bandwidth
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_configureRfFrequency_finish()

error_t IfxRfe_configureRfFrequency_finish ( IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t  handle)

Change the DPLL's target frequency.

It does not turn on the PAs automatically. - asynchronous finish wrapper

Note
It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_configureRfFrequency_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling
Parameters
handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_configureRfFrequency_start call
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_configureRfFrequency_start()

error_t IfxRfe_configureRfFrequency_start ( IfxRfe_configureRfFrequency_t  req,
IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t *  handle 
)

Change the DPLL's target frequency.

It does not turn on the PAs automatically. - asynchronous start wrapper

Note
The function is blocking until the command is sent, but does not wait for the command execution
Parameters
reqStructure containing the request parameters
handle[out] Handle for the async command
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_send otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_configureRx_exp()

error_t IfxRfe_configureRx_exp ( uint8_t  data_width_sel,
uint8_t  gain_sel,
uint8_t  data_rate_sel,
uint8_t  start_mode 
)

Configure the receivers.

  • expanded parameter version
    Parameters
    data_width_selRX Chain Data width selection
    gain_selRX Chain gain selection.Used to apply a calibrated gain configuration at TIA, LPF, DFE and PF
    data_rate_selHSRIF data rate selection for CSI2 operation
    start_modeHSRIF start mode for CSI2 operation
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    Note

◆ IfxRfe_configureTxPower_exp()

error_t IfxRfe_configureTxPower_exp ( uint8_t  action_mask,
uint8_t  ch_mask,
uint16_t  tx_pa_slope_scale_fact,
const uint16_t  plvl[4] 
)

Store up to 4 power levels along with power configuration timing for each transmitter channel.

  • expanded parameter version
    Parameters
    action_maskConfiguration action for the selected channels:
    ch_maskFlags to specify which channels to configure.
    tx_pa_slope_scale_factPA Slope scaling factor of TX, 2^-8..5.0 in UQ8.8 format for TX.
    plvlPower back-off level of TX, 0..20[dB] in Q8.7 format.
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif fixed-length array pointer is NULL
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly otherwise

)

key1Key1 value of the block to be downloaded.
lengthNumber of code words in the block.

◆ IfxRfe_downloadFwFunctions_finish()

error_t IfxRfe_downloadFwFunctions_finish ( IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t  handle)

Download a given block of RAM Firmware - asynchronous finish wrapper.

Note
It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_downloadFwFunctions_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling
Parameters
handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_downloadFwFunctions_start call
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_downloadFwFunctions_start()

error_t IfxRfe_downloadFwFunctions_start ( IfxRfe_downloadFwFunctions_t  req,
IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t *  handle 
)

Download a given block of RAM Firmware - asynchronous start wrapper.

Note
The function is blocking until the command is sent, but does not wait for the command execution
Parameters
reqStructure containing the request parameters
handle[out] Handle for the async command
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif array is NULL and length greater 0
IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_send otherwise

)

reqStructure containing the request parameters

Return values

IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized

◆ IfxRfe_executeCalibration_exp()

error_t IfxRfe_executeCalibration_exp ( uint16_t  calib_sub_func_id,
uint32_t  tx_ch_pow_idx,
uint16_t  ref_temp_idx,
uint16_t  limit_temp,
IfxRfe_executeCalibrationResult_t *  res 
)

Performs the warm-up calibration of the MMIC - expanded parameter version.

Parameters
calib_sub_func_idFlags for the calibrations to be performed:
tx_ch_pow_idxIf bit is set, perform the power calibration for the selected power index of the selected TX channel.
ref_temp_idxReference temperature index to decide if calibration should be executed (0 = no reference temperature).
limit_tempTemperature difference limit to avoid recalibration if actual temperature difference is less than this limit (in Q12.3 format).
res[out] Result read from CTRX
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_executeCalibration_finish()

error_t IfxRfe_executeCalibration_finish ( IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t  handle,
IfxRfe_executeCalibrationResult_t *  res 
)

Performs the warm-up calibration of the MMIC - asynchronous finish wrapper.

Note
It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_executeCalibration_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling
Parameters
handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_executeCalibration_start call
res[out] Result read from CTRX
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise

error_t IfxRfe_executeCalibration_start ( IfxRfe_executeCalibration_t  req,
IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t *  handle 
)

Note

Parameters
reqStructure containing the request parameters
handle[out] Handle for the async command
Return values

IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_send otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_executeMonitoring_exp()

error_t IfxRfe_executeMonitoring_exp ( uint8_t  detail_result,
uint16_t  monitoring_sub_func_id,
uint32_t  nmod,
uint8_t  tx_ch_mask,
uint8_t  hp_sel,
const uint8_t  pl_tx[8],
const uint16_t  phase_tx[8],
IfxRfe_executeMonitoringResult_t *  res 
)

Execute the monitoring routines - expanded parameter version.

Parameters
detail_resultFlag for enabling the writing of the monitoring result in the respective result area.
monitoring_sub_func_idFlags for the monitoring functions to be performed.
nmodTX modulator (DPLL) static frequency during monitoring.
tx_ch_maskFlags to specify on which TX channels to run the monitoring on.
hp_selRX Chain HP corner frequency selection for BB Monitoring.
pl_txPower level Index of the specified channel. Ignored if corresponding channel bit is not set in Channel Mask.
phase_txPhase index of the specified channel. Ignored if corresponding channel bit is not set in Channel Mask.
res[out] Result read from CTRX
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif fixed-length array pointer is NULL
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_finishFwDownload()

Finalize the firmware download and execute an application reset (no return if successful, since it will execute a reset).

IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly otherwise

    handle[out] Handle returned from the CTRX
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_configureAndExecuteHandle otherwise
    Finalize the firmware download and execute an application reset (no return if successful, since it will execute a reset).
  • configure & execute handle (new) wrapper
    Parameters
    handle[out] Handle returned from the CTRX
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_configureAndExecuteHandle otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_finishFwDownload_finish()

error_t IfxRfe_finishFwDownload_finish ( IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t  handle)

Finalize the firmware download and execute an application reset (no return if successful, since it will execute a reset).

  • asynchronous finish wrapper
    Note
    It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_finishFwDownload_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
    The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling
    Parameters
    handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_finishFwDownload_start call
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise
    Finalize the firmware download and execute an application reset (no return if successful, since it will execute a reset).
  • asynchronous finish wrapper
    Note
    It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_finishFwDownload_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
    The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling
    Parameters
    handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_finishFwDownload_start call
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise

error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_send otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_getTemperature()

error_t IfxRfe_getTemperature ( IfxRfe_getTemperatureResult_t *  res)

Parameters
res[out] Result read from CTRX
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
Note

◆ IfxRfe_getTemperature_finish()

error_t IfxRfe_getTemperature_finish ( IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t  handle,
IfxRfe_getTemperatureResult_t *  res 
)

Read the temperature from all the DTSs.

  • asynchronous finish wrapper
    Note
    It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_getTemperature_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
    The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling
    Parameters
    handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_getTemperature_start call
    res[out] Result read from CTRX
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_getTemperature_start()

error_t IfxRfe_getTemperature_start ( IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t *  handle)

Read the temperature from all the DTSs.

  • asynchronous start wrapper
    Note
    The function is blocking until the command is sent, but does not wait for the command execution
    Parameters
    handle[out] Handle for the async command
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_send otherwise

It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_gotoLowPower_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling

handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_gotoLowPower_start call
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success

IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_handleError_exp()

error_t IfxRfe_handleError_exp ( uint8_t  action,
uint16_t  error_mask_1,
bool  error_mask_1_present,
uint8_t  length,
const uint32_t *  error_mask_2,
IfxRfe_handleErrorResult_t *  res 
)

Read and optionally clear error flags.

  • expanded parameter version
    Note
    The function does not check, whether the returned array length matches the request parameters, it is user responsibility
    Parameters
    actionAction to be performed
    error_mask_1Error word mask to specify which error of Error Status 1 shall be cleared.
    error_mask_1_presentFlag to indicate whether the field error_mask_1 should be serialized
    lengthNumber of words in error_mask_2
    error_mask_2Error word mask to specify which error of Error Status 2 shall be cleared.
    res[out] Result read from CTRX
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif array is NULL and length greater 0
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly otherwise

    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif array is NULL and length greater 0
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_configureAndExecuteHandle otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_handleResetReason_execConfigUpdate()

error_t IfxRfe_handleResetReason_execConfigUpdate ( uint8_t  handle,
IfxRfe_handleResetReason_t  req,
IfxRfe_handleResetReasonResult_t *  res 
)

Read or clear reset reason (previous error status).

  • configure & execute handle (update) wrapper
    Parameters
    handleHandle of the already configured firmware command to be updated and executed
    reqStructure containing the request parameters
    res[out] Result read from CTRX
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif array is NULL and length greater 0
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_configureAndExecuteHandle otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_handleResetReason_exp()

error_t IfxRfe_handleResetReason_exp ( uint8_t  action,
uint16_t  error_mask_1,
bool  error_mask_1_present,
uint8_t  length,
const uint32_t *  error_mask_2,
IfxRfe_handleResetReasonResult_t *  res 
)

Read or clear reset reason (previous error status).

  • expanded parameter version
    Note
    The function does not check, whether the returned array length matches the request parameters, it is user responsibility
    Parameters
    actionAction to be performed
    error_mask_1Error word mask to specify which error of Error Status 1' shall be cleared.
    error_mask_1_presentFlag to indicate whether the field error_mask_1 should be serialized
    lengthNumber of words in error_mask_2
    error_mask_2Error word mask to specify which error of Error Status 2' shall be cleared.
    res[out] Result read from CTRX
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif array is NULL and length greater 0
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_handleResetReason_finish()

error_t IfxRfe_handleResetReason_finish ( IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t  handle,
IfxRfe_handleResetReasonResult_t *  res 
)

Read or clear reset reason (previous error status).

  • asynchronous finish wrapper
    Note
    It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_handleResetReason_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
    The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling
    The function does not check, whether the returned array length matches the request parameters, it is user responsibility
    Parameters
    handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_handleResetReason_start call
    res[out] Result read from CTRX
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_handleResetReason_start()

error_t IfxRfe_handleResetReason_start ( IfxRfe_handleResetReason_t  req,
IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t *  handle 
)

Read or clear reset reason (previous error status).

  • asynchronous start wrapper
    Note
    The function is blocking until the command is sent, but does not wait for the command execution
    Parameters
    reqStructure containing the request parameters
    handle[out] Handle for the async command
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif array is NULL and length greater 0
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_send otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_initialize_finish()

error_t IfxRfe_initialize_finish ( IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t  handle)

Change of initialization settings - asynchronous finish wrapper.

Note
It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_initialize_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling
Parameters
handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_initialize_start call
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise

    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match or received command id does not match
    IFXRFE_E_FAILEDif length in response does not match length in request
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeHandle otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_readMemory_execConfig()

error_t IfxRfe_readMemory_execConfig ( IfxRfe_readMemory_t  req,
IfxRfe_readMemoryResult_t *  res,
uint8_t *  handle 
)

Reads data words from a set of addresses.

  • configure & execute handle (new) wrapper
    Parameters
    reqStructure containing the request parameters
    res[out] Result read from CTRX
    handle[out] Handle returned from the CTRX
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    IFXRFE_E_FAILEDif length in response does not match length in request
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_configureAndExecuteHandle otherwise

IfxRfe_readMemory_t  req,

)

Reads data words from a set of addresses.

◆ IfxRfe_readMemory_exp()

error_t IfxRfe_readMemory_exp ( uint8_t  region,
uint8_t  length,
uint32_t  passkey,
uint32_t  from_addr,
IfxRfe_readMemoryResult_t *  res 
)

Reads data words from a set of addresses.

  • expanded parameter version
    Note
    The function does not check, whether the returned array length matches the request parameters, it is user responsibility
    Parameters
    regionRegion of memory to read from
    lengthNumber of data words to be read
    passkeyPasskey to access given addresses
    from_addrRelative start address in the region to read the data words
    res[out] Result read from CTRX
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    IFXRFE_E_FAILEDif length in response does not match length in request
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_readMemory_finish()

error_t IfxRfe_readMemory_finish ( IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t  handle,
IfxRfe_readMemoryResult_t *  res 
)

Reads data words from a set of addresses.

  • asynchronous finish wrapper
    Note
    It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_readMemory_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
    The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling
    The function does not check, whether the returned array length matches the request parameters, it is user responsibility
    Parameters
    handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_readMemory_start call
    res[out] Result read from CTRX
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    IFXRFE_E_FAILEDif length in response does not match length in request
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_readMemory_start()

error_t IfxRfe_readMemory_start ( IfxRfe_readMemory_t  req,
IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t *  handle 
)

Reads data words from a set of addresses.

  • asynchronous start wrapper
    Note
    The function is blocking until the command is sent, but does not wait for the command execution
    Parameters
    reqStructure containing the request parameters
    handle[out] Handle for the async command
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_send otherwise

Enable/Disable clock MCU and/or clock PHY output.

Command is valid only after switching to external clock derived from XIN. - asynchronous finish wrapper

Note
It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_setClockOutput_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling

handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_setClockOutput_start call
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise

    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_configureAndExecuteHandle otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_setMmicClock_exp()

Enable the clock input.

    Parameters
    action_maskActions which should be performed.

◆ IfxRfe_setMmicClock_finish()

error_t IfxRfe_setMmicClock_finish ( IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t  handle)

Enable the clock input.

  • asynchronous finish wrapper
    Note
    It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_setMmicClock_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
    The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling
    Parameters
    handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_setMmicClock_start call
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise

)

◆ IfxRfe_setTxOutput_exp()

error_t IfxRfe_setTxOutput_exp ( uint8_t  ch_mask,
uint8_t  action_mask,
const uint8_t  pl_tx[8],
const uint16_t  phase_tx[8] 
)

Enable or disable transmitter to transmit the RF signal.

  • expanded parameter version
    Parameters
    ch_maskFlags to specify on which channels to perform the action.
    action_maskAction to be performed for the selected channels.
    pl_txPower level Index of the specified channel. Ignored if corresponding channel bit is not set in Channel Mask.
    phase_txPhase index of the specified channel. Ignored if corresponding channel bit is not set in Channel Mask.
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif fixed-length array pointer is NULL
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly otherwise

    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_configureHandle otherwise

IfxRfe_wait_t  req 
)

Instructs firmware to wait for a specified time.

  • configure handle (update) wrapper

    reqStructure containing the request parameters
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success

◆ IfxRfe_wait_exp()

error_t IfxRfe_wait_exp ( uint32_t  wait_time)

Instructs firmware to wait for a specified time.

  • expanded parameter version
    Parameters
    wait_timeWait time specified in UQ32.0 format having 5 ns resolution. Maximum value is 80 ms.
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_wait_finish()

error_t IfxRfe_wait_finish ( IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t  handle)

Instructs firmware to wait for a specified time.

  • asynchronous finish wrapper
    Note
    It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_wait_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
    The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling
    Parameters
    handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_wait_start call
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_wait_start()

error_t IfxRfe_wait_start ( IfxRfe_wait_t  req,
IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t *  handle 
)

Instructs firmware to wait for a specified time.

  • asynchronous start wrapper
    Note
    The function is blocking until the command is sent, but does not wait for the command execution
    Parameters
    reqStructure containing the request parameters
    handle[out] Handle for the async command
    Return values
    IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
    IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
    IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
    IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
    Note
    error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_send otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_writeMemory_exp()

error_t IfxRfe_writeMemory_exp ( uint8_t  region,
uint8_t  length,
uint32_t  passkey,
uint32_t  start_addr,
const uint32_t *  data_word 
)

Write memory range of a specified region after verifying passkey as needed - expanded parameter version.

Parameters
regionRegion of memory to be written.
lengthNumber of data words to be written
passkeyPasskey to access given addresses
start_addrRelative start address in the region to write Data Words
data_wordData words to be written
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif array is NULL and length greater 0
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_writeMemory_finish()

error_t IfxRfe_writeMemory_finish ( IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t  handle)

Write memory range of a specified region after verifying passkey as needed - asynchronous finish wrapper.

Note
It is not allowed to execute any commands between the last IfxRfe_writeMemory_start and this call, otherwise the CTRX answer would be invalid for this call
The function is waiting blockingly for the RFT pin to be set, so if minimal execution time is needed, check RFT pin state before calling
Parameters
handleAsync handle returned from the last IfxRfe_writeMemory_start call
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_UNEXPECTED_VALUEif received response length does not match
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_read otherwise

◆ IfxRfe_writeMemory_start()

error_t IfxRfe_writeMemory_start ( IfxRfe_writeMemory_t  req,
IfxRfe_asyncHandle_t *  handle 
)

Write memory range of a specified region after verifying passkey as needed - asynchronous start wrapper.

Note
The function is blocking until the command is sent, but does not wait for the command execution
Parameters
reqStructure containing the request parameters
handle[out] Handle for the async command
Return values
IFXRFE_E_SUCCESSon success
IFXRFE_E_NOT_INITIALIZEDif IfxRfe is not initialized
IFXRFE_E_INVALID_SIZEif length is too high
IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif array is NULL and length greater 0
IFXRFE_E_MISSING_PARAMETERif handle is NULL
Note
error code returned from IfxRfe_fwCall_executeDirectly_send otherwise
